## Plan

- Why is this change needed?
- What files or systems does it affect?
- What edge cases were considered?
- What is the next slice after this work?

## Review

- What alternatives were considered?
- What risks remain?
- Who should review this?

## Implementation

- What was changed?
- What was intentionally deferred?

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual verification
- [ ] Root validation rerun: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run test`, `npm run build`, `npm run lint`

## Follow-ups

- What should happen next?
